name: agent-teams
description: Spawn a Lead + Implementer + Reviewer + Tester (+ optional dedicated Security Checker) team and drive multi-task work in Waves with built-in quality gates. The Lead is the only role allowed to execute destructive git operations, and only `git add` (per-path) and `git commit` (no amend) — every other destructive operation (reset / restore / push / rebase / merge / revert / cherry-pick / --amend / branch -D / clean / stash drop / worktree remove) is forbidden even for the Lead, eliminating shared-workspace race conditions by construction. All teammates are spawned in a single Phase 2 batch; the Tester is requested exactly once at the end of each wave (per-commit verification requests are forbidden). The skill is manually invoked via `/agent-teams <task description>` (automatic invocation is disabled). Includes spawn-prompt templates, a wave-composition template, a Lead checklist, and references for git permissions, Implementer pitfalls (literal control bytes), and Tester request consolidation.
